name: Chris's Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the powdered sugar and butter thoroughly.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Incorporate the flour, mixing until combined.
4. Stir in the vanilla extract, lemon juice, and canned milk.
5. Beat until the mixture is fluffy and smooth.
6. Pour into an angel food pan or bundt pan (I use a bundt pan).
7. Bake at 320°F for 1½ hours, or 310°F if you prefer a lighter brown top.
8. Allow to cool completely before serving.
